title: c/common in the release-1.2 branch needs to be bumped
body: containers/common in the versions of Buildah and Podman have been bumped to v0.33.1.  I believe the version in the release-1.2 branch also needs to be bumped (maybe the other c/* projects too?) and a Skopeo 1.2.2 release created for RHEL 8.4.

comments.body: Closing. release-1.2 and v1.2.2 have v0.33.4 and master has v0.34.0.
